titleStmt.title: SII 39.185: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 185. (A.R. No. 185 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL JAṬĀVARMAN TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-17TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of land purchased at Puttagaram alias Svāmisantosh chatūrvēdimaṅgaḷam a hamlet of Kaṭṭaṉūr, and made as tirunāmattukkāṇi to the temple of Śittiramēḻi Tiruppuṭkuḻi in Dāmaṟ nāḍu, a sub-division of Dāmaṟkōṭṭam, in Jayaṅgoṇḍa-chōḻamaṇḍalam by Aṇantaṉ Pōrēru and brothers of the same village. Signatory Taṇḍaganāṭṭupperarutāchāriyam is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī sundarapāṇḍyadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7 vatu miṉanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu trayodaśiyum
caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa catayattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattut tāmaṟ koṭṭattut tāmarnāṭṭut tiruppati cittirameḻit tiruppuṭkuḻi nāyanār
koyil śrī paṇṭārattukkuk kaṭavārkku Immaṇṭalattu Ittoṭṭattu Inta tiruppuṭkuḻi nāyaṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kaṭṭaṉūr pirinta puttakaram svāmi sa
n=toṣaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu ṟṟu Aṉantaṉ poreṟum tampimārum pakkal Iṟṟai nāḷil paṇam nūṟṟu muppatu vilaiyākak koṇṭa paṅ
kāy Ippaṅkil vilaivikkattūkka muḷḷatuṇṭākilum Eṅkaḷ tamappaṉārkkunṉākiṟa teṉṟu piccaṉ Allāḷapperumāḷukku kuṭuttapaṇam nūṟṟai
mpatiraṇṭu Ivviḻukkāṭṭil vityāsam Irupatāl vantatum menteṉ Oṉṟu poreṟṟiṉa śrī hastattile Udakam paṇṇikkuṭutta paṅku Oṉṟu Ippa
ṅku candrādittavarai tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka cellakkaṭavatāṉmai . Ivai taṇṭakanāṭṭup poruḷācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
